description: You are a forensic science technician digitizing a crime scene sketch for 'Case 402' based on the measurements and requirements in ~/Desktop/case_files/field_notes_402.txt. Create a dimensionally accurate diagram using a scale of 1 meter = 50 pixels, with the North-West (top-left) corner of the room interior as the (0,0) origin. The diagram must include room boundaries, the door, evidence markers (A, B, C), the victim body outline, and a text label 'Scale: 1m = 50px'. Use rectangles for room/furniture and circles for evidence markers. Save the diagram as ~/Diagrams/case_402_sketch.drawio and export it as a PDF to ~/Diagrams/case_402_exhibit.pdf.
